frictions.description: Task prompt used class-style import names (MediaCrawlerAdapter, XhsDownloaderAdapter, DouyinDownloaderAdapter) but actual adapters expose module-level load_samples() functions, not classes
frictions.resolution: Used correct imports: from intelligence.adapters.mediacrawler import load_samples

summary: Tested 5 assertions: 5 passed, 0 failed. All three adapters (mediacrawler, xhs_downloader, douyin_downloader) correctly extract engagement, creator, and media fields. Chinese number parsing handles all formats (万, decimal 万, plain digits, empty, None). All 6 pytest adapter tests pass.
